title: hieracium ciliatiflorum
intro: Hieracium ciliatiflorum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
